workflows.name: Research Loop
workflows.description: Browse web → search/query → assess time range → summarize workstream. Your default research-to-insight pipeline.
workflows.recommendation: Add a 15-min timer to prevent rabbit holes. Exit after 2 rounds max. If no answer, escalate to AI agent.

workflows.name: Annotation Pipeline
workflows.description: Summarize workstream → create annotation summary → write description.
workflows.recommendation: This is your strongest chain (0s gaps = instant flow). Use it immediately after completing any task to capture learnings.

workflows.name: Deep Browse
workflows.description: Extended web browsing sessions (3+ consecutive visits).
workflows.recommendation: DANGER: This is your #1 time sink (44.4% of all events). Set a hard 15-min timer. After 3 visits, MUST switch to Annotation Pipeline to capture what you learned.

workflows.name: GettUpp Focus Sprint
workflows.description: Single-project deep work sessions on GettUpp.
workflows.action_sequence: single-project focus → mixed actions → sustained output
workflows.recommendation: Your best workflow. Protect it: no Slack, no email, no browser tabs outside project scope. Schedule 2h blocks.

workflows.name: Multi-Project Juggle
workflows.description: Sessions spanning 2+ projects with context switches. Longer sessions but lower intensity per project.
workflows.action_sequence: ProjectA work → context_switch → ProjectB work → switch back
workflows.recommendation: AVOID when possible. Resumption lags are often tens of minutes in field observations. If unavoidable, use 'batch mode': finish one project's task list COMPLETELY before switching.

workflows.name: Late Night Push
workflows.description: Work sessions starting 10PM-5AM CST. High productivity score at 3AM (!) but costs 5.5h recovery gap next day.
workflows.action_sequence: late start → sustained work → eventual crash
workflows.recommendation: Your 3AM productivity (score 18.83) is real but unsustainable. The 5.5h recovery gap means net output is NEGATIVE vs sleeping and starting fresh at 6AM. Reserve for deadlines only.

workflows.name: Query-Driven Investigation
workflows.recommendation: Good analytical pattern. Improve by adding a 'conclusion step' — after 3 query rounds, force yourself to write a 1-sentence finding.

workflows.name: IronClad Sprint
workflows.recommendation: NEEDS MORE of these. IronClad is your priority product but only has 5 focused sessions. Schedule daily 90-min blocks.

workflows.name: Tool Exploration / Config
workflows.description: IDE configuration, tool setup, debugging environment issues. Necessary but often becomes a trap.
workflows.recommendation: Cap at 30 min. If not solved, Docker/reset/move on. Your LTM shows 15+ config troubleshooting workstreams. Write a runbook and STOP reinventing the wheel.

workflows.name: Conversation Sprint
workflows.recommendation: Good for unblocking. Limit to 45-min bursts. Always end with Annotation Pipeline to capture insights.
